name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Experience ultimate clarity and style with our UV Protection Sunglasses. These feature polarized lenses that block 100% of harmful UVA and UVB rays, perfect for long days on the sand.

name: Quick-Dry Beach Towel
description: Say goodbye to heavy, damp towels. Our AquaSoft microfiber technology absorbs moisture instantly and dries in minutes under the sun. Sand-resistant and ultra-portable.

name: Mineral Sunscreen SPF 50
description: Broad-spectrum physical barrier against intense summer heat. Reef-safe, non-greasy, and enriched with organic aloe vera for skin hydration.

name: Insulated Cooler Bag
description: Keep your drinks ice-cold for up to 12 hours. Features triple-layer thermal insulation and a leak-proof lining, perfect for beach picnics and boat trips.

name: Wide-Brim Straw Hat
description: Hand-woven from sustainable straw. The extra-wide brim provides superior shade for your face and neck while keeping you cool with a breathable design.

name: Waterproof Phone Pouch
description: Capture every underwater memory. IPX8 certified waterproof up to 100 feet with a crystal-clear window that maintains full touch-screen sensitivity.
